sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74304" key="o)cuko/rakos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-κόρᾰκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κόραξ</foreign> II) <sense id="n74304.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a sharp hook,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σμιλίον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.87</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
